title: aggregate_pi_v1 — manifest contract for cohort θπ aggregation
description: PLANNED. Validates POST /api/actions when type='aggregate_pi'. Combines per-sample pestPG files (samples_theta_pi_pestpg) into a cohort θπ track at a requested scale. Pure-Python compute; persisted under _cache/server_results/aggregate_pi/{hash}.json. Targets the 05_aggregated/ output directory once that pipeline lands.

cohort_label.description: Optional label for the resulting cohort track (e.g. 'all226', 'pruned81', 'K8_cluster3').
